mainEntity.name: Do client testimonials help AI visibility in Phoenix?
mainEntity.text: Do client testimonials help AI visibility in Phoenix?

acceptedAnswer.text: Limited; AI prefers peer-reviewed directories over testimonials, but they aid reviews indirectly.

suggestedAnswer.text: Use for site patterns, not direct boost. Phoenix values reviews more. Ethical limits apply. Reinforce directories. Better for conversions than rankings.

name: Testimonials Role in Phoenix AI
description: Limited; AI prefers peer-reviewed directories over testimonials, but they aid reviews indirectly.
